title: Cherry-pick v0.0.11 features lost in v0.0.12
changes: Restored version display in header (viz-version span + loadVersion())
Restored queue column filter (All/Ready/Pending/Rework buttons with localStorage persistence)
Restored complete column time filter (1d/1w/1m/All buttons with localStorage persistence)
Restored queue column grouping by status with sub-headers
Restored complete column sort by updated_at descending
Restored depends_on display in detail panel with clickable dependency links
Restored changelog_ref display in detail panel
Restored Created/Updated timestamps in detail panel using formatDate()
Restored slug-based parent/child lookup (n.id === pid || n.slug === pid)
Replaced inline styles with CSS classes for #liaison-mode and #version-history-btn
Restored checkForUpdate() call in poll cycle
